tasks.subject: Task 1: Ground the real integration points
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Answer the integration questions this plan cannot fully resolve without live grounding access.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migration head confirmed", "AW-283 claims interface confirmed or blocking gap reported", "evidence-delivery mechanism identified", "mini-game result mechanism identified", "orchestrator call site identified", "ResolvedCase loading mechanism confirmed", "participant/session ID types confirmed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Accusation and SuspectLock schema (migration + ORM)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the accusations and suspect_locks tables (D-078 precedent).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["migrations/versions/000N_add_accusations_table.py", "engine/db/orm.py"], "verifyCommand": "alembic upgrade head && alembic downgrade -1 && alembic upgrade head", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migration applies and reverses cleanly", "Accusation and SuspectLock ORM classes match migration", "submitted_at server-default now()", "suspect_locks unique constraint present"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Scoring Pydantic DTOs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define engine/scoring/ in-process data shapes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/scoring/__init__.py", "engine/scoring/models.py", "engine/tests/test_scoring_models.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_scoring_models.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AccusationOutcome closed enum", "AccusationAttempt forbids extra fields", "ScoreBreakdown carries all per-dimension totals"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Deterministic score calculator (Tables 1-4)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure functions implementing Tables 1-4, proven against the design doc's three worked scenarios.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/scoring/errors.py", "engine/scoring/calculator.py", "engine/tests/test_scoring_calculator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_scoring_calculator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["evidence_points correct", "momentum_multiplier matches Table 2", "accusation_base_value interpolates continuously", "wrong_accusation_cost matches Table 3 with escalation", "chain_reaction_countdown matches Table 4 with floor", "Scenario A totals 384", "Scenario B totals 210", "Scenario C totals 56", "functions pure and deterministic"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Accusation resolver — submission, lockout, tie-break, Chain Reaction, Last Word, Suspect Lock
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AccusationResolver: DB-backed submission, server-side lockout gating, tie-break, Chain Reaction wiring, Last Word first-use flow, Suspect Lock.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/scoring/resolver.py", "engine/tests/test_scoring_resolver.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_scoring_resolver.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lockout gating enforced server-side", "AlreadyCorrectError enforced", "wrong accusation scoring and lockout correct", "correct accusation scoring with momentum correct", "first-correct tie-break exactly one true per session", "Chain Reaction compresses persisted countdown", "Last Word first-use allows one follow-up then blocks", "Suspect Lock upserts, no Accusation row"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Early Last Call trigger — arc-content change and orchestration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename grill/twist exit conditions, add grill->last_call shortcut edge, wire orchestration invoking the correct transition for the correct cause.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nightcap/couch-race.arc.json", "engine/tests/test_scoring_integration.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_scoring_integration.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exit conditions renamed correctly", "grill->last_call edge added", "last_call/twist entry_conditions remain empty", "orchestrator invokes correct event per cause", "wrong-event-for-wrong-cause test present", "both branches of accusations_locked_or_countdown_expired tested separately"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: ContentEvent factories — animated stings, race track, reveal breakdown
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Presentation-hint-driven events; no raw numbers/dimension names pre-reveal.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/scoring/events.py", "engine/tests/test_scoring_events.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_scoring_events.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sting event payload excludes raw score and dimension names", "sting event always has non-default presentation_hints", "race track event has exactly one position field", "reveal breakdown event carries full ScoreBreakdown targeting AudienceTarget.all"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Scoring telemetry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Payload builders + recorders mirroring engine/telemetry/obligations.py.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/telemetry/scoring.py", "engine/tests/test_telemetry_scoring.py", "engine/scoring/resolver.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_telemetry_scoring.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mirrors obligations.py telemetry pattern", "payload excludes other players' suspect locks", "recorder wired into resolver on every submission"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Superlative computation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure functions computing Best Interrogator, Lie Detector, Most Confidently Wrong.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/scoring/superlatives.py", "engine/tests/test_scoring_superlatives.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_scoring_superlatives.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all three superlative keys present", "lie_detector tie-break deterministic", "most_confidently_wrong tie-break deterministic", "reproducible on identical inputs"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: End-path integration tests — all three paths plus passive-player coverage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove all three endgame paths reachable and deterministic via headless harness runs, plus passive-player coverage.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/tests/test_scoring_integration.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/test_scoring_integration.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Path 1 reachable and correct", "Path 2 reachable and correct", "Path 3 reachable and distinct from Path 2", "passive player doesn't block any path", "all scenarios use real resolver and real state machine"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Generic-naming enforcement and full suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove engine/scoring/ and engine/telemetry/scoring.py carry no Nightcap-specific identifiers; full suite green. Stopping point -- no sign-off or PR from this task.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine/tests/test_scoring_naming_contract.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest engine/tests/ -v && python -m ruff check engine api && python -m ruff format --check engine api", "acceptanceCriteria": ["naming contract test covers engine/scoring and engine/telemetry/scoring.py", "full suite green", "ruff clean", "routing evals still pass"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
